title: Totem Overlay
description: A clean and minimal totem overlay that reduces screen clutter while keeping a vanilla-friendly look, ideal for PvP and SMP gameplay.
body:
# Totem Overlay
This texture pack gives Minecraft a **clean, minimal**, and **improved totem** look while staying close to **vanilla**. It replaces the default large on-screen totem with a smaller, less intrusive version, making it perfect for PvP, **SMP, and general gameplay** where visibility matters.
- The goal of this pack is to keep the classic feel of Minecraft while reducing visual clutter, so you can focus more on your surroundings without losing **important visuals**.

## Compatibility
- Tested on: 1.21.8+ – 1.20.x (Main version: 1.21+)
- Other versions: not tested

## Requirements
- **No mods required**, this pack works on vanilla Minecraft.

## Credits
- Pack created by **[_Melted](https://modrinth.com/user/_Melted)**.
